title: Blade (disambiguation)
content:
'''Blade''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Fire blade]]
*[[Blade emitter]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Blade-class starfighter|''Blade''-class]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] used by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]
*[[Blade series|''Blade'' series]] of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] used by the [[Adumar/Legends|Adumari]].
*[[Blade bomber]], a model of Wookiee [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]].
*[[Blade Squadron (True Invids)|Blade Squadron]], a starfighter [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] under renegade [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Leonia Tavira]].
*[[Blade emitter/Legends|Blade emitter]], a component of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] construction.
*[[Daggerblade]]
*[[Fire blade/Legends|Fire blade]]
*[[Harvest blade]]
*[[Ryyk blade/Legends|Ryyk blade]], a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] weapon.

==See also==
*[[Vibroblade (disambiguation)]]
